name: Almond Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the chicken dry with paper towels.
2. Cut into strips that are 1/2 inch wide and 3 inches long.
3. Stir together soy sauce, rice wine, chicken stock, sugar, cornstarch, ginger, and garlic in a bowl.
4. Place the chicken in the marinade, turning to coat.
5. Marinate for at least one hour, turning the chicken after 30 minutes.
6. Remove the chicken from the marinade and drain on paper towels.
7. Beat egg with 1/2 teaspoon water in another bowl.
8. Dip each chicken piece into the egg mixture, then roll in almonds to coat.
9. Let the almond-coated pieces set for 15 minutes.
10. Heat the oil to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
11. Fry the chicken pieces in batches until crispy and golden brown.
12. Allow the oil to return to 350 degrees between batches.
13. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately.
